title: Shin Eva Official Social Media
wikitext:
[]: Shin Eva - Official Social Media Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 28, 2017 10:04 am April 2017 - khara held a production meeting about Shin Evangelion tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) July 2017 - A new promotional illustration was uploaded on Eva's website, social accounts got a new cover tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Japanese  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Evangelion's site updated with new image - First tease of Shin Eva? Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Jul 28, 2017 10:07 am At the bottom under the title is says "In Production" So give it another year or so :P

[]: Re: Evangelion's site updated with new image - First tease of Shin Eva? Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 28, 2017 10:09 am Google Translate's app give me non useful translations: "Continue, and the end." "Non, and anti." "Keenly making" EDIT: official English version SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Evangelion's site updated with new image - First tease of Shin Eva? Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Jul 28, 2017 10:13 am The two vertical texts seem like vague philosophy. EDIT: lul, official english version didn't get the typographical attention What's more interesting is they only update the main page and not the specific page: http://www.evangelion.co.jp/final.html So no date, no real news, back to hibernation.

[]: Re: Evangelion's site updated with new image - First tease of Shin Eva? Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 28, 2017 10:26 am I'm sooo hyped right now! Where's this official(??) English version from?

[]: Re: Evangelion's site updated with new image - First tease of Shin Eva? Post by Arcadia's legacy » Fri Jul 28, 2017 10:29 am The error and the antithesis eh? Anyone up for some potentially futile but fun guesswork as to what that could be referring to?

[]: Re: Evangelion's site updated with new image - First tease of Shin Eva? Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Jul 28, 2017 10:36 am Website has an ENGLISH button at the bottom left

[]: Re: Evangelion's site updated with new image - First tease of Shin Eva? Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 28, 2017 10:36 am @SSD: go on the offial site's mainpage and click ENGLISH on the low right. MASSIVE FANWANKING WARNING: I noticed that the image is composed by 5 big rectangles, so I checked the dimensions of the image and they are 1920x4039. That "1920" was quite suspicious and I decided to do a simple "4039:5" to see if something would come out of this. Well 4039:5 is 808 (actually 807,8, but I rounded it up). So the image could be seen as 5 blocks of 1920x808, which casually turns out to be a classic 2.40:1 aspect ratio, the modern cinematic one used by Q. I believe that this is the first scene of Shin Eva, with the camera going moving downwards mirroring the end of Q. I won't change my mind until release date. EDIT: Just look at it, it's almost the same image seen on a mirror (or the opposite if you count the opposite amount of sky and earth). SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Evangelion's site updated with new image - First tease of Shin Eva? Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 28, 2017 10:51 am Arcadia's legacy wrote: The error and the antithesis eh? Anyone up for some potentially futile but fun guesswork as to what that could be referring to?

[]: Re: Evangelion's site updated with new image - First tease of Shin Eva? Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jul 28, 2017 10:52 am Huzzah!!!!!!

[]: Re: Evangelion's site updated with new image - First tease of Shin Eva? Post by mammaluser » Fri Jul 28, 2017 10:54 am Joseki wrote: @SSD: go on the offial site's mainpage and click ENGLISH on the low right. MASSIVE FANWANKING WARNING: I noticed that the image is composed by 5 big rectangles, so I checked the dimensions of the image and they are 1920x4039. That "1920" was quite suspicious and I decided to do a simple "4039:5" to see if something would come out of this. Well 4039:5 is 808 (actually 807,8, but I rounded it up). So the image could be seen as 5 blocks of 1920x808, which casually turns out to be a classic 2.40:1 aspect ratio, the modern cinematic one used by Q. I believe that this is the first scene of Shin Eva, with the camera going moving downwards mirroring the end of Q. I won't change my mind until release date. EDIT: Just look at it, it's almost the same image seen on a mirror (or the opposite if you count the opposite amount of sky and earth).

[]: Re: Evangelion's site updated with new image - First tease of Shin Eva? Post by mammaluser » Fri Jul 28, 2017 10:56 am Normal people: Ah, but it's in production, it'll take one or two years more for it to be finished Me: I DONT CARE I KNOW NOW THAT IT'S OFFICIALLY HAPPENING AAAAAAAAAA!

[]: Re: Evangelion's site updated with new image - First tease of Shin Eva? Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jul 28, 2017 10:59 am Normal people: It'll probably be a full year. Fuck! Me: I've been here for these films since I was a young lad in 2006. Now that I'm an old man filled with regret a year is like tomorrow.

[]: Re: Evangelion's site updated with new image - First tease of Shin Eva? Post by pwhodges » Fri Jul 28, 2017 11:07 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: Now that I'm an old man filled with regret a year is like tomorrow.

[]: Re: Evangelion's site updated with new image - First tease of Shin Eva? Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jul 28, 2017 11:13 am Actually a nerdy shoutout to a line Ken Watanabe delivers in INCEPTION. But, yes. This is VERY good news. News for the final film might not be regularly occurring - would be pleasantly surprised if we hear anything else before the end of 2017 - but I think we're finally past the point of "No news for years on end"

[]: Re: Evangelion's site updated with new image - First tease of Shin Eva? Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 28, 2017 11:22 am New image on the Twitter/Facebook cover, this is the highest resolution and wider option, it's from the Twitter cover: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Evangelion's site updated with new image - First tease of Shin Eva? Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jul 28, 2017 11:30 am I am a happy man doing his happy dance.

[]: Re: Evangelion's site updated with new image - First tease of Shin Eva? Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Jul 28, 2017 11:36 am My heart almost stopped when I saw this poster on Eva Fan's website. It's like finding an oasis in the middle of the desert. I'm so excited!

[]: Re: Evangelion's site and Facebook/Twitter covers updated with new images - First teases of Shin Eva Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jul 28, 2017 11:38 am They even finally took down Anno's over two-year-old letter about how he's going to take a break to make Shin Godzilla.

[]: Re: Evangelion's site and Facebook/Twitter covers updated with new images - First teases of Shin Eva Post by hui43210 » Fri Jul 28, 2017 12:08 pm Excitement levels reaching maximum!!!!!!!!! Also if you're disappointed by this, of course we're at least a year away , there's been zero promotion since Godzilla. This is awesome because the promos are starting, which means trailers and and release dates are going to begin any time . This is the official start of the journey if you will.
summary: []: Shin Eva - Official Social Media Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 28, 2017 10:04 am April 2017 - khara held a production meeting about Shin Evangelion tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) July 2017 - A new promotional illustration was uploaded on Eva's website, social accounts got a new cover tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelecto
